---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# nmfgenr

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of nmfgenr is to ...

## Installation

You can install the development version of nmfgenr like so:

``` {r installation}
library(devtools)
#install_github("MartaPelizzola/nmfgenr",force = TRUE, build_vignettes = TRUE)
#library(nmfgenr)
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

```{r example}
library(nmfgenr)
## basic example code
```
